reasons: Validates core GCI functionality that Jasper depends on is present and working.
Latest 3.6.x release (3.6.7 was pulled due to a critical bug).
Catches any regressions across the 3.6.x series before the major 3.7 boundary.
First version to include GciTsNbPoll (used for non-blocking execution) and a significant batch of new GciTs* functions.
Validates Jasper works with the expanded 3.7 GCI API surface.
Introduced GciTsLogin_ (the netldiName login variant) and stricter GCI login flag validation — previously invalid flag combinations were silently ignored, now they error.
Validates Jasper's login path against this stricter behavior.
Fixed a thread-safety bug in GciTsLogin() and changed GCI error codes.
Validates Jasper against the current target environment.
